phrases.cultural_note: The Musée du Petit Palais keeps standard museum hours and is closed on Tuesdays.

responses.phonetic: duh dee zuhr ah trez uhr, pwee duh kah-torz ah dee-zweet uhr. fair-MAY luh mar-DEE
responses.local: De dix heures à treize heures, puis de quatorze à dix-huit heures. Fermé le mardi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main gallery is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la galerie principale ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah gah-luh-REE prahn-see-PAL
phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays Italian Renaissance paintings and medieval sculptures across several galleries.

responses.english: On the first floor, at the top of the stairs.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, ahn oh duh les-kah-LYAY
responses.local: Au premier étage, en haut de l'escalier.

phrases.text_local: Le billet inclut-il l'accès au Palais des Papes ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh bee-YAY an-kloo-TEEL lah-SAY oh pah-LAY day PAH-puh
phrases.cultural_note: Separate tickets are required. The 'Pass Palaces' ticket covers both the Petit Palais and the Palais des Papes.

responses.english: No, you need a separate ticket. Ask about the combined pass.
responses.phonetic: nohn, eel foh uhn bee-YAY say-pah-RAY. duh-mahn-DAY luh pahs kohm-bee-NAY
responses.local: Non, il faut un billet séparé. Demandez le pass combiné.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Italian primitives are displayed
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les primitifs italiens ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay pree-mee-TEEF ee-tah-LYAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée du Petit Palais holds one of Europe's finest collections of medieval Italian painting, including works by Botticelli.

responses.english: On the first floor, rooms five to nine.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, sal SANK ah NUF.
responses.local: Au premier étage, salle cinq à neuf.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is included in the city pass
phrases.text_local: Le musée est-il compris dans le pass Avignon ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY ay-TEEL com-PREE dahn luh pas ah-veen-YON

responses.english: Yes, with the Avignon Tourism pass.
responses.phonetic: wee, ah-VEK luh pas ah-veen-YON toor-EEZM.
responses.local: Oui, avec le pass Avignon Tourisme.
